metadata.description: A unique event celebrating musical excellence and bringing together some of the world’s finest saxophonists in the historic city of Guimarães. Over four days, enjoy concerts, masterclasses, workshops, and conferences with internationally renowned artists.
metadata.ogDescription: A unique event celebrating musical excellence and bringing together the world’s finest saxophonists in the historic city of Guimarães.
metadata.keywords: Guimarães, Saxophone Festival, Music, Concerts, Masterclasses, Workshops, Saxophonists, Portugal, Guimarães Conservatory
